evals.description: Triggers on open-source license selection for a new library
evals.prompt: I'm publishing a new JavaScript utility library to npm. Which open-source license should I use?

evals.description: Triggers on AGPL compliance question for SaaS
evals.prompt: We're building a SaaS product and one of our dependencies uses the AGPL-3.0 license. Is this a problem?

evals.description: Triggers on trade secret protection request
evals.prompt: How do I protect our proprietary recommendation algorithm as a trade secret?

evals.description: Triggers on contractor IP agreement question
evals.prompt: We're hiring a freelance developer to build a feature. What IP clauses do we need in the contract?

evals.description: Triggers on trademark filing process question
evals.prompt: We want to register our startup name as a trademark in the US. What is the process?
How do I audit all the open-source licenses in our Node.js monorepo for compliance?

evals.description: Correctly explains the difference between patent and trade secret protection
evals.prompt: Should we patent our machine learning model or keep it as a trade secret?

evals.description: Correctly distinguishes GPL from LGPL for library linking
evals.prompt: We want to use a library licensed under LGPL in our proprietary application. Are we allowed to do that?

assertions.value: you must open-source your entire application

evals.description: Correctly explains IP ownership for employee-created code
evals.prompt: An employee wrote code for a side project on a weekend using their personal laptop but it is related to our business. Who owns it?

evals.description: Recommends provisional patent application for cost-effective priority date
evals.prompt: We have a novel technical invention but cannot afford to file a full patent application right now. What can we do?

evals.description: Does not give legal advice as definitive legal conclusions
evals.prompt: Is our use of this GPL library definitely legal?

evals.description: Does not trigger for general software licensing questions unrelated to IP strategy
evals.prompt: What is the best pricing model for our SaaS subscription tiers?
